source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
Director, Product
source_jobs.description:
<p><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">As Director, Product, </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">you’ll</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph"> own the strategy and roadmap for our&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">largest&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">and&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">fastest&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">growing&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">use</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">cases</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">,</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">and&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">product as a&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">whole</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">. </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">You’ll</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph"> translate market, customer and competitor insight into a clear product vision and orchestrate&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">engineering</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">, research, design, </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">marketing</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph"> and sales to&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">land it&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">at scale</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">.</span></span><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">​</span></span> </p>
